vertical_split_selection.sort_order: descending by non_pk_column_count, then table name

base_predicate_sqls: ("Order Date" IS NOT NULL AND "Order Date" <= '2015-05-19')
("Order Date" IS NOT NULL AND "Order Date" > '2015-05-19' AND "Order Date" <= '2016-05-22')
("Order Date" IS NOT NULL AND "Order Date" > '2016-05-22' AND "Order Date" <= '2017-07-19')
fragment_roles: rows where Order Date > 2017-07-19 or is NULL
rows where Profit > 28.7064 or is NULL
rows where Profit > 22.4316 or is NULL
rows where Profit > 34.2144 or is NULL

relocation_engine_debug.pair_weight_meaning: Weights count co-occurrences of two fragments (from different original tables) inside workload queries that already span 2+ locals. They rank relocation candidates; they do not equal the number of queries that will become single-local after a move.
